001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.csv;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
020
021import java.util.*;
022
023/**
024 * Serializes nested objects and arrays to CSV cell inline notation:
025 * {@code {key:val;key2:val2}} and {@code [val1;val2;val3]}.
026 *
027 * <p>
028 * Used when {@code allowNestedStructures()} is enabled on the serializer.
029 */
030public final class CsvCellSerializer {
031
032   private final CsvByteArrayCellFormat byteArrayFormat;
033   private final String nullMarker;
034
035   /**
036    * Creates a new serializer.
037    *
038    * @param byteArrayFormat Format for byte[] values.
039    * @param nullMarker String to use for null values.
040    */
041   public CsvCellSerializer(CsvByteArrayCellFormat byteArrayFormat, String nullMarker) {
042      this.byteArrayFormat = byteArrayFormat != null ? byteArrayFormat : CsvByteArrayCellFormat.BASE64;
043      this.nullMarker = nullMarker != null ? nullMarker : "null";
044   }
045
046   /**
047    * Serializes a value to inline notation.
048    *
049    * @param value The value to serialize.
050    * @param session The serializer session (for bean conversion, date formatting, etc.).
051    * @return The serialized string.
052    */
053   public String serialize(Object value, CsvSerializerSession session) {
054      return serializeValue(value, session);
055   }
056
057   @SuppressWarnings({
058      "java:S3776" // Cognitive complexity acceptable for exhaustive CSV value type dispatch
059   })
060   private String serializeValue(Object value, CsvSerializerSession session) {
061      if (value == null)
062         return nullMarker;
063      if (value instanceof Map<?, ?> m)
064         return serializeMap(m, session);
065      if (value instanceof Collection<?> c)
066         return serializeCollection(c, session);
067      if (value instanceof Object[] a)
068         return serializeObjectArray(a, session);
069      if (value instanceof byte[] b)
070         return byteArrayFormat == CsvByteArrayCellFormat.SEMICOLON_DELIMITED ? formatByteArraySemicolon(b) : base64Encode(b);
071      if (value instanceof int[] a) return formatIntArray(a);
072      if (value instanceof long[] a) return formatLongArray(a);
073      if (value instanceof double[] a) return formatDoubleArray(a);
074      if (value instanceof float[] a) return formatFloatArray(a);
075      if (value instanceof short[] a) return formatShortArray(a);
076      if (value instanceof boolean[] a) return formatBooleanArray(a);
077      if (value instanceof char[] a) return formatCharArray(a);
078      // Bean or simple: use session to convert/format
079      var prepared = session.prepareForInlineValue(value);
080      if (prepared instanceof Map) return serializeMap((Map<?, ?>) prepared, session);
081      if (prepared instanceof Collection) return serializeCollection((Collection<?>) prepared, session);
082      if (prepared instanceof Object[] objectArray) return serializeObjectArray(objectArray, session);
083      return escapeIfNeeded(prepared.toString());
084   }
085
086   private String serializeMap(Map<?, ?> m, CsvSerializerSession session) {
087      var sb = new StringBuilder();
088      sb.append('{');
089      var first = true;
090      for (var e : m.entrySet()) {
091         if (!first) sb.append(';');
092         first = false;
093         var k = e.getKey();
094         var v = e.getValue();
095         sb.append(escapeIfNeeded(k != null ? k.toString() : nullMarker));
096         sb.append(':');
097         sb.append(serializeValue(v, session));
098      }
099      sb.append('}');
100      return sb.toString();
101   }
102
103   private String serializeCollection(Collection<?> c, CsvSerializerSession session) {
104      var sb = new StringBuilder();
105      sb.append('[');
106      var first = true;
107      for (var v : c) {
108         if (!first) sb.append(';');
109         first = false;
110         sb.append(serializeValue(v, session));
111      }
112      sb.append(']');
113      return sb.toString();
114   }
115
116   private String serializeObjectArray(Object[] a, CsvSerializerSession session) {
117      var sb = new StringBuilder();
118      sb.append('[');
119      for (var i = 0; i < a.length; i++) {
120         if (i > 0) sb.append(';');
121         sb.append(serializeValue(a[i], session));
122      }
123      sb.append(']');
124      return sb.toString();
125   }
126
127   private static String formatIntArray(int[] a) {
128      var sb = new StringBuilder();
129      sb.append('[');
130      for (var i = 0; i < a.length; i++) {
131         if (i > 0) sb.append(';');
132         sb.append(a[i]);
133      }
134      sb.append(']');
135      return sb.toString();
136   }
137
138   private static String formatLongArray(long[] a) {
139      var sb = new StringBuilder();
140      sb.append('[');
141      for (var i = 0; i < a.length; i++) {
142         if (i > 0) sb.append(';');
143         sb.append(a[i]);
144      }
145      sb.append(']');
146      return sb.toString();
147   }
148
149   private static String formatDoubleArray(double[] a) {
150      var sb = new StringBuilder();
151      sb.append('[');
152      for (var i = 0; i < a.length; i++) {
153         if (i > 0) sb.append(';');
154         sb.append(a[i]);
155      }
156      sb.append(']');
157      return sb.toString();
158   }
159
160   private static String formatFloatArray(float[] a) {
161      var sb = new StringBuilder();
162      sb.append('[');
163      for (var i = 0; i < a.length; i++) {
164         if (i > 0) sb.append(';');
165         sb.append(a[i]);
166      }
167      sb.append(']');
168      return sb.toString();
169   }
170
171   private static String formatShortArray(short[] a) {
172      var sb = new StringBuilder();
173      sb.append('[');
174      for (var i = 0; i < a.length; i++) {
175         if (i > 0) sb.append(';');
176         sb.append(a[i]);
177      }
178      sb.append(']');
179      return sb.toString();
180   }
181
182   private static String formatBooleanArray(boolean[] a) {
183      var sb = new StringBuilder();
184      sb.append('[');
185      for (var i = 0; i < a.length; i++) {
186         if (i > 0) sb.append(';');
187         sb.append(a[i]);
188      }
189      sb.append(']');
190      return sb.toString();
191   }
192
193   private static String formatCharArray(char[] a) {
194      var sb = new StringBuilder();
195      sb.append('[');
196      for (var i = 0; i < a.length; i++) {
197         if (i > 0) sb.append(';');
198         sb.append((int) a[i]);
199      }
200      sb.append(']');
201      return sb.toString();
202   }
203
204   private static String formatByteArraySemicolon(byte[] b) {
205      var sb = new StringBuilder();
206      for (var i = 0; i < b.length; i++) {
207         if (i > 0) sb.append(';');
208         sb.append(b[i] & 0xff);
209      }
210      return sb.toString();
211   }
212
213   private static String escapeIfNeeded(String s) {
214      if (s == null)
215         return "";
216      for (var i = 0; i < s.length(); i++) {
217         var c = s.charAt(i);
218         if (c == ';' || c == ':' || c == '{' || c == '}' || c == '[' || c == ']' || c == '"' || c == '\\')
219            return quoted(s);
220      }
221      return s;
222   }
223
224   private static String quoted(String s) {
225      var sb = new StringBuilder();
226      sb.append('"');
227      for (var i = 0; i < s.length(); i++) {
228         var c = s.charAt(i);
229         if (c == '"' || c == '\\')
230            sb.append('\\');
231         sb.append(c);
232      }
233      sb.append('"');
234      return sb.toString();
235   }
236}
